intro: Over the past two weeks, financial services, government, and e-commerce sectors have been the primary targets in a series of 17 cybercrime incidents, with 11 rated as high severity. LockBit, Chinese Transnational Organized Crime, and REvil were observed across attacks affecting the Caribbean, Global, Latin America, Southeast Asia, and the United States. The reporting period from April 13 to April 27, 2026, highlights a concentrated wave of activity against these regions and industries.
